<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>JCMB Ministries</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cinzel+Decorative:wght@700&family=Lora:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400&family=Montserrat:wght@300;400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  :root {
    --navy: #1a2a4a;
    --gold: #c9a84c;
    --gold-light: #e8c97a;
    --cream: #f5f0e8;
    --white: #ffffff;
    --teal: #4ab8c1;
  }
  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
  body { font-family: 'Lora', serif; background: #0a1228; color: var(--cream); overflow-x: hidden; }

  .hero {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100vh;
    min-height: 500px;
    background: url('data:image/png;base64,') center center / cover no-repeat;
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-end;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .hero::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(10,18,40,0.05) 0%, rgba(10,18,40,0.1) 60%, rgba(10,18,40,0.88) 100%);
  }
  .hero-scroll-cue {
    position: relative; z-index: 2;
    margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;
    animation: fadeInUp 1.2s 0.5s both;
  }
  .hero-scroll-cue span {
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 0.35em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold-light); opacity: 0.85;
  }
  .chevron {
    width: 22px; height: 22px;
    border-right: 2px solid var(--gold-light);
    border-bottom: 2px solid var(--gold-light);
    transform: rotate(45deg);
    animation: bounce 1.6s infinite;
    opacity: 0.7;
  }

  .content {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #0a1228 0%, #111e3a 100%);
    position: relative;
  }
  .content::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--gold), var(--teal), var(--gold), transparent);
  }

  .section {
    max-width: 860px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 4rem 2rem;
  }
  .section + .section {
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.18);
  }
  .section-label {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.4em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 1.8rem;
  }
  .section-label::before, .section-label::after {
    content: ''; display: block; width: 28px; height: 1px; background: var(--gold); opacity: 0.6;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Cinzel Decorative', cursive;
    font-size: clamp(1.4rem, 3vw, 2rem); color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 2rem; line-height: 1.3;
  }

  .announce-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap: 1.2rem;
  }
  .announce-card {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);
    border-left: 3px solid var(--gold);
    border-radius: 6px; padding: 1.2rem 1.4rem;
    transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
  }
  .announce-card:hover { background: rgba(201,168,76,0.08); transform: translateY(-2px); }
  .announce-day { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.3em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--teal); margin-bottom: 0.4rem; }
  .announce-title { font-family: 'Lora', serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 0.25rem; }
  .announce-time { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--gold-light); opacity: 0.85; }

  .lineup-row { display: flex; gap: 1.2rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .lineup-card {
    flex: 1 1 200px;
    background: rgba(74,184,193,0.07);
    border: 1px solid rgba(74,184,193,0.25);
    border-radius: 8px; padding: 1.4rem 1.8rem; text-align: center;
    text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
  }
  .lineup-card:hover { background: rgba(74,184,193,0.14); transform: translateY(-3px); }
  .lineup-icon { font-size: 1.8rem; margin-bottom: 0.6rem; display: block; }
  .lineup-card-title { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.28em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--teal); margin-bottom: 0.3rem; }
  .lineup-card-sub { font-family: 'Lora', serif; font-size: 0.92rem; color: var(--cream); opacity: 0.8; }

  .preaching-divider { max-width: 860px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 2rem 2rem 3.5rem; text-align: center; }
  .preaching-divider-inner {
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3);
    border-radius: 10px; padding: 2.2rem 2rem;
    background: rgba(201,168,76,0.04); position: relative;
  }
  .preaching-divider-inner::before {
    content: '✦'; position: absolute; top: -0.75rem; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
    background: #111e3a; padding: 0 0.8rem; color: var(--gold); font-size: 1rem;
  }
  .preaching-label { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.45em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 0.6rem; }
  .preaching-title { font-family: 'Cinzel Decorative', cursive; font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 2.5vw, 1.6rem); color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .preaching-sub { font-family: 'Lora', serif; font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--cream); opacity: 0.65; font-style: italic; }
  .watch-btn {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.55rem;
    margin-top: 1.4rem; padding: 0.7rem 1.8rem;
    background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--gold); border-radius: 40px;
    color: var(--gold-light); font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase;
    text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s;
  }
  .watch-btn:hover { background: var(--gold); color: var(--navy); }

  @keyframes fadeInUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
  @keyframes bounce { 0%, 100% { transform: rotate(45deg) translateY(0); } 50% { transform: rotate(45deg) translateY(5px); } }
  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .section { padding: 2.8rem 1.2rem; }
    .announce-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-scroll-cue">
    <span>Scroll to continue</span>
    <div class="chevron"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<main class="content">
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-label">📢 Announcements</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Upcoming Events</h2>
    <div class="announce-grid">
      <div class="announce-card">
        <div class="announce-day">Wednesday</div>
        <div class="announce-title">Prayer Meeting</div>
        <div class="announce-time">7:00 PM</div>
      </div>
      <div class="announce-card">
        <div class="announce-day">Friday</div>
        <div class="announce-title">Youth Fellowship</div>
        <div class="announce-time">6:30 PM</div>
      </div>
      <div class="announce-card">
        <div class="announce-day">Sunday</div>
        <div class="announce-title">Sunday Service</div>
        <div class="announce-time">9:00 AM</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-label">🎵 Song Lineup</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Worship Songs</h2>
    <div class="lineup-row">
      <div class="lineup-card">
        <span class="lineup-icon">🎶</span>
        <div class="lineup-card-title">This Sunday</div>
        <div class="lineup-card-sub">View Song List</div>
      </div>
      <div class="lineup-card">
        <span class="lineup-icon">🎼</span>
        <div class="lineup-card-title">Next Sunday</div>
        <div class="lineup-card-sub">View Song List</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="preaching-divider">
    <div class="preaching-divider-inner">
      <div class="preaching-label">📖 Preaching Word</div>
      <div class="preaching-title">Sunday Service Message</div>
      <div class="preaching-sub">Jesus Christ the Master Builder Ministries</div>
      <a href="https://www.facebook.com/jcmbministries/videos/3412800465537120" target="_blank" class="watch-btn">
        ▶ &nbsp;Watch on Facebook
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</main>

</body>
</html>
